Name: Kafue Tilapia Pond #1 – 2,500 Grow-Out Fish
Description: Tilapia (Oreochromis niloticus) intensive grow-out pond, 0.5ha earthen pond. 2,500 fish at avg 350g. Stocking density 5,000/ha. Monthly water quality monitoring. Target harvest weight 500g.

Name: Kafue Tilapia Pond #2 – 3,000 Grow-Out Fish
Description: Tilapia (Oreochromis niloticus) intensive grow-out pond, 0.6ha earthen pond. 3,000 fish at avg 280g. Fed on commercial 35% protein pellets. Registered with Fisheries Department, Lusaka.

Name: Kafue Tilapia Pond #3 – 2,800 Grow-Out Fish
Description: Tilapia (Oreochromis niloticus) semi-intensive grow-out pond, 0.5ha earthen pond. 2,800 fish at avg 320g. Supplemental feeding and organic fertilization management system.

Name: Kafue Catfish (Clarias) Pond #4 – 1,800 Grow-Out Fish
Description: African catfish (Clarias gariepinus) grow-out pond, 0.4ha lined pond. 1,800 fish at avg 450g. Carnivorous feeding regime, 45% protein pellets. Targeted for Lusaka restaurant market.
LockedReason: Pledged as collateral – MFEZ Agri-Finance loan

Name: Kafue Catfish (Clarias) Pond #5 – 2,200 Grow-Out Fish
Description: African catfish (Clarias gariepinus) grow-out pond, 0.5ha lined pond. 2,200 fish at avg 380g. Automatic paddle-wheel aerator. Night feeding regime for optimal growth rate.

Name: Kafue Fingerling Hatchery – 150,000 Tilapia Fingerlings
Description: Recirculating aquaculture system (RAS) hatchery. 150,000 tilapia fingerlings (3-5cm) in hatchery tanks. Ready for stocking into grow-out ponds within 2 weeks. DNA-certified Stirling strain.

Name: Kafue River Cage Aquaculture – 4 Net Cages (Tilapia)
Description: 4 floating net cages (5m x 5m x 3m each) installed in Kafue River licensed zone. 4,000 tilapia per cage, total 16,000 fish at avg 200g. Fisheries Dept Cage License No. KAF/CA/2024/07.

Name: Kapenta Drying Operation – 18-Tonne Annual Dried Kapenta Stock
Description: Rig-based kapenta (Limnothrissa miodon) harvesting operation on Lake Kariba, cooperative-owned. Annual production: 18 tonnes dried kapenta. Processed at Siavonga drying station. ZPPA certified.

Name: Paddle-Wheel Aeration System – 4 Units (2.2kW each)
Description: 4 x Chinese-manufactured 2.2kW paddle-wheel aerators for dissolved oxygen management in catfish and tilapia grow-out ponds. Timer-controlled, 3-phase, galvanised floats. Installed 2024.

Name: Moba 660E Fish Feed Pellet Extruder
Description: Moba 660E floating fish feed extruder, 660kg/hr capacity, 22kW motor, produces 2-8mm floating pellets. Used for on-site production of 35% protein tilapia feed from local ingredients.

Name: Yamaha 40hp Outboard Motor on 6m Fibreglass Boat
Description: 6m GRP fibreglass boat with Yamaha F40 40hp 4-stroke outboard. Used for net setting, fish sampling, cage inspection and harvest on Kafue River zone. Current Fisheries Dept vessel registration.

Name: Cold Chain Refrigerated Processing Shed (20 tonne capacity)
Description: Insulated processing shed, 200m², with 2 x 5-tonne blast-freeze rooms and 1 x 10-tonne cold storage room. ZABS-certified fish processing facility. Stainless-steel filleting and packing lines.

Name: Kapenta Fishing Rig with Coleman Lights – Lake Kariba
Description: Traditional kapenta rig vessel, 12m aluminium hull, 2 x 55kW generator sets, 8 x Coleman 1000W light rings for attraction fishing, 4-drum nylon net system. Lake Kariba licensed zone.

Name: Kafue Farm Pond Site – Title Deed 8ha Fish Farm Land
Description: Freehold title for 8-hectare fish farm site on Kafue River floodplain. Site includes 5 earthen ponds, hatchery building, processing shed, workers' accommodation. Title No. LSD/KAF/2022/031.

Name: Kafue Hatchery Site – Leasehold 2ha Hatchery Land
Description: State leasehold for 2-hectare hatchery expansion site adjacent to main fish farm. Ministry of Fisheries permit. Includes RAS building, feed store and quarantine tank infrastructure.

Name: Kafue Riverside Apiary – 50 Langstroth Hives
Description: 50 Langstroth hives on river bank between fish ponds. Apis mellifera scutellata colony. Honey produced from riparian vegetation (Acacia, Combretum). Registered Zambia Honey Council.

Name: Kafue Flats Bee Hive Token – 30 Top-Bar Hives
Description: 30 Kenya top-bar hives placed along Kafue Flats grassland. Traditional low-input honey production. Annual yield 1.2 tonnes seasonal honey. Wax also harvested. ZICM training-managed.

Name: Frozen Tilapia Stock Receipt – 4.8 Tonnes (Cold Store)
Description: HACCP-certified cold storage receipt for 4.8 tonnes of blast-frozen tilapia fillets and whole fish in the cooperative's processing shed cold room. Temperature -18°C. Packed and labelled.

Name: Dried Kapenta Stock Receipt – 6.5 Tonnes (Siavonga Depot)
Description: ZPPA-certified receipt for 6.5 tonnes of sun-dried kapenta stored in Siavonga locked depot. Moisture content 12%. Ready for distribution to Lusaka urban markets. ZABS certified.

Name: Kafue River Water Intake License – 80,000 m³/annum
Description: WARMA water intake license Permit No. WARMA/WA/LSK/0508. Authorized abstraction of 80,000 m³/annum from Kafue River for fish pond filling, water replacement and hatchery supply.

Name: Aquaculture Feeding Barge – Automated Pond Feeder System
Description: Custom automated feeding barge, pond-mounted, with 200kg hopper and 6-station demand feeder. Bluetooth-controlled feeding schedule. Covers 3 grow-out ponds simultaneously.

Name: YSI Pro30 Water Quality Monitoring Kit Set (3 units)
Description: 3 x YSI Pro30 portable water quality meters for dissolved oxygen, temperature and conductivity monitoring across pond sites. Calibration certificates current. Essential for biosecurity compliance.

Name: Solar Borehole Pump – Hatchery Water Supply (5kW)
Description: Lorentz PS2 solar-powered borehole pump, 5kW array, providing clean groundwater supply to hatchery RAS system. Flow: 8 m³/hr at 40m head. Installed and commissioned 2024.

Name: Isuzu NKR 200 Refrigerated Fish Transport Truck
Description: 2023 Isuzu NKR 200 light truck fitted with 3-tonne insulated refrigerated body (0°C to -20°C). Used for fresh and frozen fish distribution to Lusaka supermarkets and restaurants. Plates: ABD 5812 LSK.

Name: Kafue Prawn (Freshwater) Trial Pond – 4,500 Macrobrachium
Description: Pilot freshwater prawn (Macrobrachium rosenbergii) culture pond, 0.3ha lined pond. 4,500 post-larvae at avg 8g. Supervised by ZARI aquaculture researcher. First commercial-scale trial in Zambia.
